Class Deck

java.lang.Object
com.cluegame.cards.Deck
public class Deck extends Object
Represents the full deck of 21 Clue! cards. Handles shuffling, sealing the murder envelope, and dealing to players.
Author:
Thanh Shaw

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    private List<Card>
    cards
     

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Deck()
    Constructs a full deck of 21 cards: 6 suspects, 6 weapons and 9 rooms.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<List<Card>>
    deal(int numPlayers)
    Deals cards as evenly as possible to the given number of players.

    Returns all cards in the deck.

    Shuffles the deck randomly.

    Returns the total number of cards in the deck.

  • Constructor Details

    • Deck

      public Deck()
      Constructs a full deck of 21 cards: 6 suspects, 6 weapons and 9 rooms.

  • Method Details

    • shuffle

      public void shuffle()
      Shuffles the deck randomly.

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the total number of cards in the deck.
      Returns:
      number of cards

    • deal

      public List<List<Card>> deal(int numPlayers)
      Deals cards as evenly as possible to the given number of players. Returns a list of hands, one per player.
      Parameters:
      numPlayers - the number of players to deal to
      Returns:
      list of card hands

    • getCards

      public List<Card> getCards()
      Returns all cards in the deck.
      Returns:
      list of all cards
